en.title: I Spy...
en.subtitle: Can you find all the hidden objects?

en.winTime: You found all the objects in {time}.
en.winPersonalBest: Well done, this is your personal best time!
en.offlineSubtitle: You can still play the game.
en.offlineAudioHint: Go online once to make the audio hints work.
en.offlineSceneUnavailable: This scene isn't available offline. Connect to the internet to play it.
en.madeInIndiaWith: with lots of ❤️ and AI coding with Cursor, Claude & Gemini :)

hi.title: ढूँढो तो जानें
